title: Air-Fried Creamy Date Night Argentinian Dish
description: A tender and garlicky date-night Argentinean dish featuring cream and perfect for a gluten-free night in.
instructions: Mix together gluten-free flour, Greek yogurt, cream cheese, heavy cream, garlic powder, cumin, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Stir until smooth.
Whisk in the milk, egg replacers, and basil into the mixture until fully combined and there are no clumps of flour left.
Place dollops of the batter on the tray lined with parchment paper, making sure to leave enough space between them for air circulation when frying.
Air fry for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through. Flip halfway through cooking time for even browning.
Remove from the air fryer and let cool slightly before serving.
